name: Meet Our Team
description: Meet the SOS Moving team — licensed professionals led by CEO Alex Park. Experienced movers, coordinators & managers serving Los Angeles and San Francisco.

about.name: SOS Moving Company
about.description: Professional, licensed, and insured moving company with highly skilled movers delivering peace of mind through moving and storage services in Los Angeles and San Francisco.

member.name: Alex Park
member.description: Alex Park founded SOS Moving in 2022 with a clear mission: make every move in Los Angeles stress-free, transparent, and professional. Over the past four years he has personally overseen thousands of local and long-distance relocations across Southern California.

member.name: Rayna
member.description: As a salesperson at SOS Moving, I take pride in helping customers during their relocation and showcasing our exceptional services. My emphasis is on delivering outstanding experiences through customized solutions, clear communication, and professionalism.

member.name: Sarah
member.description: Sarah manages the customer experience at SOS Moving, helping families and businesses navigate every step of their relocation. She is the go-to expert on moving insurance, cost comparisons, and finding the right storage solution for your situation.

member.name: Jacob
member.description: Jacob coordinates every long-distance and interstate relocation at SOS Moving, planning routes from California to Oregon, Washington, Colorado, Texas, and beyond. He understands USDOT regulations, state-to-state logistics, and the details that keep your belongings safe over hundreds or thousands of miles.

member.name: Amir
member.description: Amir leads SOS Moving crews across every neighborhood in Los Angeles — from downtown high-rises to Malibu beachfront homes. As Senior Move Foreman, he specializes in handling heavy and fragile items including pianos, pool tables, antiques, and gym equipment.

member.name: William
member.description: William manages day-to-day operations at SOS Moving — from crew scheduling and truck routing to packing strategies for complex relocations. He has coordinated thousands of local moves across Los Angeles, handling everything from studio apartments to five-bedroom houses.
